item.title: NFFC: Nottingham Forest @NFFC · 3min Thank you to the Forest family for showing unity during this difficult time for the Ander
item.description:
Nottingham Forest @NFFC · 3min Thank you to the Forest family for showing unity during this difficult time for the Anderson family.
The Club will pay tribute to former player Henry Newton, who made over 300 appearances in the Garibaldi between 1963-1970, ahead of the home fixture against Newcastle United on Mostrar más 3 15 188 1 mil

item.description:
Arsenal @Arsenal · 18min Fine margins Playing with courage How we channel this feeling
Every word from Mikel Arteta’s post-Manchester City press conference De arsenal.com 214 56 408 24 mil

item.title: spbajko: Simon Bajkowski @spbajko · 3h Gabriel gets a yellow for moving his head towards Haaland when the pair came together. Haa
item.description: Simon Bajkowski @spbajko · 3h Gabriel gets a yellow for moving his head towards Haaland when the pair came together. Haaland also booked. No idea how that's not a red for Gabriel but I'm sure we'll hear the nonsensical reasoning soon enough 14 94 934 16 mil

item.title: spbajko: Simon Bajkowski @spbajko · 51min En respuesta a @spbajko It didn’t take long for the protection racket to emerge to tel
item.description:
Simon Bajkowski @spbajko · 51min En respuesta a @spbajko It didn’t take long for the protection racket to emerge to tell us that black is white and their colleagues are perfect again Cita The Athletic | Football @TheAthleticFC · 2h Should Gabriel have seen red? Former Premier League referee Graham Scott doesn't think so..
“The Brazil international’s late flourish looked like a potential headbutt on Erling Haaland, but he was stepping away and there was no contact that would have looked like violent conduct 4 9 46 4 mil
